conservative.name: Boon of Tzeentch
conservative.requirements:
6 Power
Must bear the Mark of Tzeetch

boon.description: Each time you remove a recharge token form this spell, gain 1 power

challenge.description: Effect: You call upon the Great Conspirator for his blessing, for the inscrutable brilliance and mastery of fate that is his domain. While this spell is recharging you may remove a recharge token from this card and add to your dice pool once per turn. If you do not do this on your turn during a given round, you may remove a recharge token from this card to add to the dice pool of an action that has you as a target once during that round. In all cases, actions modified by this spell count as arcane spells and may suffer miscasts

reckless.name: Boon of Tzeentch
reckless.requirements:
6 Power
Must bear the Mark of Tzeetch

boon.description: Enemy dice pools that you affect with this spell gain " Suffer 1 corruption"
